eatons-pulled-pork.name: Eaton's Pulled Pork

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Arrange onion slices in the bottom of a slow cooker. Season pork with salt and pepper and place over onion. Add vinegar and water.

Cook pork on Low for 8 hours. Transfer pork to a platter and shred with two forks. Remove and discard about half the pork juices from slow cooker and stir in shredded pork, barbeque sauce, and brown sugar.

eel-sauce.name: Eel Sauce
instructions: Heat soy sauce, sugar, and mirin in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Cook and stir until liquid is reduced to about 3/4 cup.

egg-white-and-pear-cake-teleculinaria.name: Egg White And Pear Cake
instructions: Hit the clears in castle very firmly, gathering 90 g of sugar gradually. Apart, mix the remaining sugar with water and oil. Add the sieved flour, yeast and pinch of salt and wrap. Reserve.
Peel 2 pears, cut them into pieces and add them to the flour preparation, stirring well. Add also the clear ones, gradually mixing gently and even obtaining a homogeneous mass.

Bind a shape (about 22 cm in diameter) with butter and sprinkle it with flour. Lay in it the previous preparation and put it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 35 minutes. Take it off, let it cool down and unshape it.
Wash and cut the remaining pear into thin slices. Sprinkle the cake with powdered sugar, dispose of the pear slices on top and brush them with agave jelly. Serve right away.

eggnog-spiked-with-rum.name: Eggnog (spiked With Rum)

ingredients.prep: such as Captain Morgan® Spiced Rum

instructions: Mix egg yolks, 2 cups sugar, rum, and nutmeg together in a large mixing bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight to 'cure.'
Beat egg whites and remaining 1 cup sugar in a bowl using an electric mixer until firm peaks form.
Fold in heavy cream. Fold in the egg yolk mixture. Beat in half-and-half until well combined.
Pour into lidded jars or containers, refrigerate, and shake before serving.

eggnog-ice-cream.name: Eggnog Ice Cream
instructions: In a heavy saucepan, bring the milk, 1 cup of the sugar, and the cream to a simmer.

Meanwhile, whisk together the egg yolks and the remaining ¼ cup of sugar. Remove the milk mixture from the heat and add a little to the egg yolk mixture to warm it, whisking constantly to keep the yolks from curdling. Pour the egg yolk mixture into the hot milk mixture, whisking the milk constantly as you pour.

Return the custard to the stove and cook it over low heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until it thickens enough to coat the back of the spoon, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat and strain it into a bowl. Let cool completely.
Stir the sherry, brandy, vanilla extract, rum, nutmeg, and salt into the custard. Chill until thoroughly cold, at least 4 hours.
Freeze in an ice-cream maker according to the manufacturer’s instructions.

eggplant-salad-from-agioreita-argiro.name: Eggplant Salad From Agioreita
instructions: First, make the eggs in the oven for about 40′ at 200°C.
After taking them, let them become lukewarm and clean.
Grab the stem and pull the soft flush with a spoon.
We put them in a colander to get their fluids out.
Add the eggs to the cutting wood and chop them.
Then put them in a bowl and add the other injectors.
Mix with a fork.
Freeze for a while in the refrigerator.
Serve the Athonite eggplant salad, sprinkle with some olive oil and finely chopped fresh parsley.
We accompany with Baked and Crisp Arab pies cut into triangles.

el-bigote.name: El Bigote

ingredients.item: Old grand-dad 114 or other high-proof bourbon
Bittermen's xocolatl mole or angostura bitters

instructions: Bring cinnamon sticks, sugar and ½ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Remove from heat and let steep 2 hours. Strain syrup into a small jar or bowl; discard cinnamon.
Syrup can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Combine mezcal, bourbon, Cocchi Americano, Sherry, bitters, and ¼ oz. cinnamon bark syrup in a large glass, mixing glass, or cocktail shaker filled with ice. Stir until outside of glass is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice and garnish with orange twist.
